name: Magnetism
scaffolding_intent: Two elements drift toward each other with sparkle particles, scaffolding coordinating conjunctions and co-mention

parameters.name: entityPrefixB
parameters.description: Entity ID of the second element (attracted toward)

parameters.name: magnetScale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the magnet sprites

parameters.name: sparkleCount
parameters.description: Number of sparkle particles at the contact point

parameters.name: sparkleRadius
parameters.description: Radius of the sparkle particle spread around the contact point

correction_intent: Child described an incorrect relationship between two grouped entities
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described the relationship between two grouped entities
